channel.title: Releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 2.2.18 2019-04-24T20:38:23Z Security update: * Update Drupal Core to 8.6.15 * SA-CORE-2019-005 * SA-CORE-2019-006 Features/Updates: - Update Drupal Core to 8.6.15 - Update Lightning to 3.2.8 - Update entityqueue to 1.0-beta2 - Update migrate_plus to 4.2 Upgrade path: Update your codebase: composer update Run database updates:

item.title: Theme Workflow
item.description: Sub-themes are just like any other theme, with one difference: They inherit the parent theme’s resources. There are no limits on the chaining capabilities connecting sub-themes for their parents. A sub-theme can be a child of another sub-theme, and it can be branched and organized however you see fit. Background Drupal WxT includes WxT Bootstrap which is a a modern, component based and accessible sub-theme powered by the Bootstrap base theme.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Releases will soon start to appear for Drupal 8 once stable releases are made. Release Created Date Description 2.2.18 2019-04-24T20:38:23Z Security update: * Update Drupal Core to 8.6.15 * SA-CORE-2019-005 * SA-CORE-2019-006 Features/Updates: - Update Drupal Core to 8.6.15 - Update Lightning to 3.2.8 - Update entityqueue to 1.0-beta2 - Update migrate_plus to 4.2 Upgrade path: Update your codebase: composer update Run database updates:
